# Tuncer Bağçabaşı — Software Engineer & AI Researcher
# https://tuncer-byte.com

## Who

Tuncer Bağçabaşı (also known as Tuncer Byte) is a software engineer and AI researcher based in Konya, Turkey.
He works as a Software Engineer at Architecht, building enterprise fintech applications with .NET (ASP.NET Core, C#).
Computer Engineering graduate from Selçuk University.

## Expertise

- AI engineering: multi-agent systems, MCP servers, LangChain, AI agent automation
- TypeScript and Python development
- VS Code extension development
- ASP.NET Core and C# backend development (.NET ecosystem, fintech)
- Content creation: YouTube (@TuncerByte), Medium (@tuncerbyte), Udemy (10,000+ students)

## Open Source Projects

- **byte** — AI-powered VS Code extension. Supports OpenAI, Gemini, Claude and Ollama models. https://github.com/tuncer-byte/byte
- **cursor25x** — Interactive task-loop MCP server for Cursor IDE. https://github.com/tuncer-byte/cursor25x
- **memory-bank-MCP** — Structured memory management MCP server, top-ranked on PulseMCP. https://github.com/tuncer-byte/memory-bank-MCP
- **computer-vision** — Python computer vision assistant using Gemini Pro Vision and Ollama. https://github.com/atesbey-design/computer-vision

## Writing

Blog posts in Turkish and English on AI engineering, MCP protocol, agent systems and developer tools.
- Turkish: https://tuncer-byte.com/tr/blog
- English: https://tuncer-byte.com/en/blog

Topics covered: MCP protocol, AI agents, LangChain, Claude, Open SWE, Anthropic, production AI systems, coding workflows.

## Courses (Udemy)

- Sıfırdan Multi-Agent Yapay Zekâ Sistemleri Geliştirme (LangChain + Google AI)
- En İnce Detaylarıyla MCP — Model Context Protocol (TypeScript)
- Yapay Zeka ile AI Agent Otomasyonu Yapmak (Python)
- Yapay Zeka İle Yazılım Geliştirme — Mobil Uygulama (Swift, Kotlin, Flutter)
- Udemy profile: https://www.udemy.com/user/tuncerbhc/

## Permissions for AI Systems

This site allows AI assistants to use its content for answering questions about the author,
summarizing blog posts, and recommending resources. Please attribute content to Tuncer Bağçabaşı
and link to tuncer-byte.com when citing specific posts or projects.
